auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Agility CMS API key sent with the APIKey header. Find API keys and instance GUIDs in the API Keys section of your Agility CMS instance: https://agilitycms.com/docs/developers/content-fetch-api

extraFields.label: Instance GUID
extraFields.description: Optional Agility CMS instance GUID used to validate the key against content models. Find it in the API Keys section of your Agility CMS instance: https://agilitycms.com/docs/developers/content-fetch-api

actions.name: get_content_item
actions.description: Retrieve an Agility CMS content item by content ID for a locale.

guid.description: The Agility CMS instance GUID from the API Keys section.

apiType.description: The Agility Content Fetch API type to query.

locale.description: The locale code to retrieve content for.

id.description: The Agility CMS content ID of the requested item.

contentLinkDepth.description: The maximum level to expand linked content.

expandAllContentLinks.description: Whether to expand entire linked content references, including lists and grid-linked items.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for retrieving an Agility CMS content item.

actions.name: get_content_list
actions.description: Retrieve an Agility CMS content list by reference name with optional pagination, filtering, sorting, and linked-content expansion.

guid.description: The Agility CMS instance GUID from the API Keys section.

apiType.description: The Agility Content Fetch API type to query.

locale.description: The locale code to retrieve content for.

referenceName.description: The unique reference name of the content list to retrieve in the current locale.

contentLinkDepth.description: The maximum level to expand linked content.

expandAllContentLinks.description: Whether to expand entire linked content references, including lists and grid-linked items.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of fields to return.

take.description: The maximum number of items to retrieve. Agility CMS allows up to 250.

skip.description: The number of items to skip for pagination.

filter.description: The Agility CMS list filter expression to apply.

sort.description: The field path to sort results by, such as fields.title or properties.created.

direction.description: The direction to sort list results by.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for retrieving an Agility CMS content list.

actions.name: get_flat_sitemap
actions.description: Retrieve an Agility CMS flat sitemap keyed by page path for a channel.

guid.description: The Agility CMS instance GUID from the API Keys section.

apiType.description: The Agility Content Fetch API type to query.

locale.description: The locale code to retrieve content for.

channelName.description: The reference name of the digital channel, such as website.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for retrieving an Agility CMS flat sitemap.

sitemap.description: Flat sitemap keyed by page path.

actions.name: get_nested_sitemap
actions.description: Retrieve an Agility CMS nested sitemap for generating menus or navigation.

guid.description: The Agility CMS instance GUID from the API Keys section.

apiType.description: The Agility Content Fetch API type to query.

locale.description: The locale code to retrieve content for.

channelName.description: The reference name of the digital channel, such as website.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for retrieving an Agility CMS nested sitemap.

sitemap.description: Nested sitemap entries returned by Agility CMS.

actions.name: get_page
actions.description: Retrieve an Agility CMS page by page ID for a locale.

guid.description: The Agility CMS instance GUID from the API Keys section.

apiType.description: The Agility Content Fetch API type to query.

locale.description: The locale code to retrieve content for.

id.description: The unique Agility CMS page ID to retrieve.

contentLinkDepth.description: The maximum level to expand linked content.

expandAllContentLinks.description: Whether to expand entire linked content references, including lists and grid-linked items.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for retrieving an Agility CMS page by ID.

actions.name: list_content_models
actions.description: List content models for an Agility CMS instance using the Content Fetch API.

guid.description: The Agility CMS instance GUID from the API Keys section.

apiType.description: The Agility Content Fetch API type to query.

lastModifiedDate.description: Only return model updates after this last modified date and time.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for listing Agility CMS content models.

models.description: Content models returned by Agility CMS.
